Simulations of the Moran genealogy process

A.A. King

One simulation of the MGP

The Moran genealogy process is described in King, Lin, and Ionides (2020).

One simulation of the sampled MGP

References

King AA, Lin Q, Ionides EL (2020). “The Sampled Moran Genealogy Process.” arXiv,. https://doi.org/10.48550/ARXIV.2002.11184.
King AA, Lin Q, Ionides EL (2024). “Exact Phylodynamic Likelihood via Structured Markov Genealogy Processes.” arXiv,. https://doi.org/10.48550/arxiv.2405.17032.
Moran PAP (1958). “Random Processes in Genetics.” Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society, 54(1), 60–71. https://doi.org/10.1017/s0305004100033193.
